import { createClientComponentClient } from "@supabase/auth-helpers-nextjs";
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
const supabase = createClientComponentClient();

const ViewCounter = ({ slug, noCount = false, showCount = true }) => {
  const [views, setViews] = useState(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    const incrementView = async () => {
      try {
        let { error } = await supabase.rpc("increment", {
          slug_text: slug,
        });
        if (error) {
          console.log(
            "Error incrementing view count inside try block :",
            error
          );
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error(
          "This error occured while incrementing the view count:",
          error
        );
      }
    };
    if (!noCount) {
      incrementView();
    }
  }, [slug, noCount]);

  if (showCount) {
    return <div>{views} views</div>;
  } else {
    return null;
  }
};

"use client";

import { createClientComponentClient } from "@supabase/auth-helpers-nextjs";
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";

const supabase = createClientComponentClient();

const ViewCounter = ({ slug, noCount = false, showCount = true }) => {
  const [views, setViews] = useState(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    const incrementView = async () => {
      try {
        let { error } = await supabase.rpc("increment", {
          slug_text: slug,
        });
        if (error) {
          console.log(
            "Error incrementing view count inside try block :",
            error
          );
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error(
          "This error occured while incrementing the view count:",
          error
        );
      }
    };

    if (!noCount) {
      incrementView();
    }
  }, [slug, noCount]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const getViews = async () => {
      try {
        let { data, error } = await supabase
          .from("views")
          .select("count")
          .match({ slug: slug })
          .single();

        if (error) {
          console.log(
            "Error incrementing view count inside try block :",
            error
          );
        }

        console.log(data);

        setViews(data ? data.count : 0);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error(
          "This error occured while incrementing the view count:",
          error
        );
      }
    };

    getViews();
  }, [slug]);

  if (showCount) {
    return <div>{views} views</div>;
  } else {
    return null;
  }
};

export default ViewCounter;`),document.getElementById("copy6").textContent="\u2714\uFE0F copied",setTimeout(()=>{document.getElementById("copy6").textContent=""},2e3)},children:(0,e.jsxDEV)(n.p,{children:"\u{1F4C4} Code Copy"},void 0,!1,{fileName:"/Users/baekki/Desktop/Portfolio/next-blog/content/_mdx_bundler_entry_point-23e9b23a-9801-46d9-bec4-f41669c945a3.mdx",lineNumber:581,columnNumber:3},this)},void 0,!1,{fileName:"/Users/baekki/Desktop/Portfolio/next-blog/content/_mdx_bundler_entry_point-23e9b23a-9801-46d9-bec4-f41669c945a3.mdx",lineNumber:499,columnNumber:1},this),`
